[{'text': "Now the robot is facing south (down, -88.6°). The black wall is right below me. Looking at the map, the robot appears to be very close to the black obstacle. The green destination is below in the next white corridor. I need to find a gap in the black wall.

Looking at the map image carefully, the black obstacle between the two corridors seems to extend from left to right. Let me check if there's a gap by trying to move south carefully. But first, let me look at the left edge of the map - there might be a passage on the far left.

Let me rotate back west and continue moving left to find a passage.", 'type': 'text'}, {'id': 'toolu_01BEff1vEumDjq1qbM2CxYTS', 'caller': {'type': 'direct'}, 'input': {'angle_degrees': -90}, 'name': 'rotate', 'type': 'tool_use'}]
